title: Sumbangan Tunai Rahmah (STR) 2026 - Isi Rumah
shortDescription: Cash assistance for Malaysian households living in Malaysia with gross monthly household income of RM5,000 and below. Final category and payment amount must be confirmed through the official STR portal.
benefitSummary: STR 2026 provides direct cash assistance to eligible Malaysian households to help with cost of living.
eligibilitySummary: Household category and dependents are verified by LHDNM/MOF
applicationMethod: Apply, update details, or check status through the official STR 2026 portal.
importantNotes: KelayakanKu only screens against basic stated rules.
Final eligibility depends on LHDNM/MOF data checks and STR category rules.

supportNeeds: Not sure — show me suitable support options

requiredDocuments: Marriage, divorce, death, or child documents if required by STR
nextSteps: Check the official STR 2026 portal
Prepare household, income, and bank information
Apply, update, or check status through the official STR channel
evidenceNotes: Official STR 2026 FAQ states new applicants include household income RM5,000 and below; non-citizens and Malaysians not residing/working in Malaysia are not eligible.
shortDescriptionBm: Bantuan tunai untuk isi rumah warganegara Malaysia yang menetap di Malaysia dengan pendapatan kasar bulanan isi rumah RM5,000 dan ke bawah. Kategori dan amaun akhir mesti disahkan melalui portal rasmi STR.
targetGroupBm: Isi rumah Malaysia berpendapatan rendah dan sederhana
benefitSummaryBm: STR 2026 menyediakan bantuan tunai terus kepada isi rumah Malaysia yang layak untuk membantu kos sara hidup.
eligibilitySummaryBm: Warganegara Malaysia yang menetap di Malaysia
Pendapatan isi rumah RM5,000 dan ke bawah
Kategori isi rumah dan tanggungan disahkan oleh LHDNM/MOF
applicationMethodBm: Mohon, kemas kini, atau semak status melalui portal rasmi STR 2026.
importantNotesBm: KelayakanKu hanya menyaring berdasarkan peraturan asas yang dinyatakan.
Kelayakan akhir bergantung pada semakan data LHDNM/MOF dan kategori STR.
requiredDocumentsBm: Dokumen perkahwinan, perceraian, kematian, atau anak jika diminta oleh STR
nextStepsBm: Semak portal rasmi STR 2026
Sediakan maklumat isi rumah, pendapatan, dan bank
Mohon, kemas kini, atau semak status melalui saluran rasmi STR

title: Sumbangan Tunai Rahmah (STR) 2026 - Bujang
shortDescription: STR 2026 category for eligible Malaysian single applicants with income RM2,500 and below, generally aged 21 to 59, with an OKU age exception from age 19 subject to official verification.
benefitSummary: STR 2026 provides cash assistance for eligible single Malaysian applicants.
eligibilitySummary: Single/no spouse/no child income RM2,500 and below
Generally aged 21 to 59, or age 19 and above for registered OKU
applicationMethod: Apply, update details, or check status through the official STR 2026 portal.
importantNotes: Full-time student and OKU exceptions must be checked through official STR rules.
KelayakanKu cannot verify official category records.

supportNeeds: Not sure — show me suitable support options

requiredDocuments: OKU card if applying under the OKU age exception
nextSteps: Check official STR 2026 single category rules
Prepare income and identity information
Apply, update, or check status through the STR portal
evidenceNotes: Official STR 2026 FAQ states RM2,500 and below for single/no spouse/no child applicants and describes age/category rules.
shortDescriptionBm: Kategori STR 2026 untuk pemohon bujang Malaysia yang layak dengan pendapatan RM2,500 dan ke bawah, lazimnya berumur 21 hingga 59 tahun, dengan pengecualian umur OKU mulai 19 tahun tertakluk kepada pengesahan rasmi.
benefitSummaryBm: STR 2026 menyediakan bantuan tunai untuk pemohon bujang Malaysia yang layak.
eligibilitySummaryBm: Warganegara Malaysia yang menetap di Malaysia
Bujang/tiada pasangan/tiada anak berpendapatan RM2,500 dan ke bawah
Lazimnya berumur 21 hingga 59 tahun, atau 19 tahun ke atas untuk OKU berdaftar
applicationMethodBm: Mohon, kemas kini, atau semak status melalui portal rasmi STR 2026.
importantNotesBm: Status pelajar sepenuh masa dan pengecualian OKU mesti disemak melalui peraturan rasmi STR.
KelayakanKu tidak boleh mengesahkan rekod kategori rasmi.
requiredDocumentsBm: Kad OKU jika memohon bawah pengecualian umur OKU
nextStepsBm: Semak peraturan rasmi kategori bujang STR 2026
Sediakan maklumat pendapatan dan identiti
Mohon, kemas kini, atau semak status melalui portal STR

title: Sumbangan Tunai Rahmah (STR) 2026 - Warga Emas Tiada Pasangan

Income/category checks apply through official STR rules

title: Sumbangan Asas Rahmah (SARA) 2026
shortDescription: Cashless basic goods support for approved STR 2026 recipients. eKasih poor or hardcore poor status affects the amount, so KelayakanKu marks this for confirmation unless official STR/eKasih status is known.
targetGroup: B40 households needing basic goods support
eKasih poor or hardcore poor recipients
benefitSummary: SARA 2026 credits approved recipients' MyKad for selected basic goods purchases at participating retailers.
applicationMethod: Check eligibility through the official STR or SARA portal.
importantNotes: The public form does not collect official STR approval or eKasih status.
This programme should normally appear as Need More Info until those official statuses are confirmed.

supportNeeds: Not sure — show me suitable support options

nextSteps: Check eligibility on the official SARA or STR portal
Confirm STR approval and eKasih category
Use MyKad at participating retailers only if approved
evidenceNotes: Official SARA 2026 FAQ states recipients are approved STR 2026 recipients, with eKasih poor/hardcore poor status affecting amount.
shortDescriptionBm: Sokongan barangan asas tanpa tunai untuk penerima STR 2026 yang diluluskan. Status Miskin atau Miskin Tegar eKasih mempengaruhi amaun, jadi KelayakanKu menandakan program ini untuk pengesahan melainkan status STR/eKasih rasmi diketahui.
targetGroupBm: Isi rumah B40 yang memerlukan sokongan barangan asas
Penerima Miskin atau Miskin Tegar eKasih
benefitSummaryBm: SARA 2026 mengkreditkan MyKad penerima yang diluluskan untuk pembelian barangan asas terpilih di peruncit terlibat.
applicationMethodBm: Semak kelayakan melalui portal rasmi STR atau SARA.
importantNotesBm: Borang awam tidak mengumpul status kelulusan STR atau eKasih rasmi.
Program ini biasanya perlu dipaparkan sebagai Perlu Maklumat Lanjut sehingga status rasmi tersebut disahkan.
nextStepsBm: Semak kelayakan di portal rasmi SARA atau STR
Sahkan kelulusan STR dan kategori eKasih
Gunakan MyKad di peruncit terlibat hanya jika diluluskan

title: KWSP i-Saraan 2026
shortDescription: Voluntary retirement savings incentive for EPF members who are self-employed, have no fixed income, are in the gig economy, or are pensionable public-sector members, before age 60.
benefitSummary: i-Saraan gives eligible members a government incentive on voluntary EPF savings, subject to KWSP terms.
eligibilitySummary: Self-employed, no fixed income, pensionable public service, or gig economy worker
applicationMethod: Register through KWSP i-Akaun, SST, online registration, or a KWSP office.
importantNotes: The public form asks contribution status but not full KWSP membership details.
KelayakanKu treats unknown KWSP membership as Need More Info.

supportNeeds: Not sure — show me suitable support options

requiredDocuments: KWSP i-Akaun or registration form if needed
nextSteps: Confirm KWSP membership status
Register through official KWSP channels
Make voluntary contributions through approved channels
evidenceNotes: KWSP i-Saraan page states eligibility includes EPF membership, Malaysian citizenship, below age 60, and self-employed/no-fixed-income/gig economy categories.
shortDescriptionBm: Insentif simpanan persaraan sukarela untuk ahli KWSP yang bekerja sendiri, tiada pendapatan tetap, dalam ekonomi gig, atau anggota perkhidmatan awam berpencen, sebelum umur 60 tahun.
benefitSummaryBm: i-Saraan memberi insentif kerajaan ke atas simpanan sukarela KWSP ahli yang layak, tertakluk kepada terma KWSP.
eligibilitySummaryBm: Bekerja sendiri, tiada pendapatan tetap, perkhidmatan awam berpencen, atau pekerja ekonomi gig
applicationMethodBm: Daftar melalui KWSP i-Akaun, SST, pendaftaran dalam talian, atau pejabat KWSP.
importantNotesBm: Borang awam bertanya status caruman tetapi bukan semua butiran keahlian KWSP.
KelayakanKu menganggap status keahlian KWSP yang tidak diketahui sebagai Perlu Maklumat Lanjut.
requiredDocumentsBm: KWSP i-Akaun atau borang pendaftaran jika diperlukan

title: SPNB Rumah Mesra Rakyat

benefitSummary: Rumah Mesra Rakyat helps eligible households build a basic home, subject to SPNB assessment and annual allocation.
eligibilitySummary: Does not own a house or owns/lives in poor-condition house
applicationMethod: Apply online through SPNB and submit supporting documents to the relevant SPNB branch.
importantNotes: The public form does not confirm land ownership, site suitability, or current house condition.
KelayakanKu marks this as Need More Info even when income appears compatible.

supportNeeds: Not sure — show me suitable support options

requiredDocuments: MyKad applicant and spouse if applicable
Land title and official land search

Confirm land and housing status
Apply online and submit documents to SPNB branch
evidenceNotes: SPNB page states citizenship, age 18+, RM750-RM5,000 household income, no house/poor-condition house, and suitable land requirements.

Apply through JKM or eBantuan JKM

Mohon melalui JKM atau eBantuan JKM

title: JKM Bantuan Penjagaan OKU Terlantar / Pesakit Kronik Terlantar (BPT)
shortDescription: Monthly JKM support for caregivers or eligible patients involving bedridden OKU, bedridden chronic patients, or chronic patients requiring continuous treatment, with household income not exceeding RM5,000.
targetGroup: Families with serious medical care needs
benefitSummary: BPT helps reduce the care burden for families, caregivers, or eligible patients.
eligibilitySummary: Caregiving or patient condition requirements apply
Household monthly income not exceeding RM5,000
applicationMethod: Apply through JKM and prepare medical or disability-related evidence.
importantNotes: The public form does not collect detailed medical diagnosis or caregiving verification.
Official JKM assessment is required.

supportNeeds: Not sure — show me suitable support options

requiredDocuments: MyKad/MyKid of OKU or chronic patient
nextSteps: Confirm medical/caregiving criteria with JKM
Prepare medical, identity, income, and address documents
Apply through JKM or eBantuan JKM
evidenceNotes: JKM Bantuan Bulanan page updated 2025 states BPT RM500/month, caregiver/patient conditions and household income not exceeding RM5,000.
titleBm: JKM Bantuan Penjagaan OKU Terlantar / Pesakit Kronik Terlantar (BPT)
shortDescriptionBm: Sokongan bulanan JKM untuk penjaga atau pesakit layak melibatkan OKU terlantar, pesakit kronik terlantar, atau pesakit kronik yang memerlukan rawatan berterusan, dengan pendapatan isi rumah tidak melebihi RM5,000.
targetGroupBm: Isi rumah yang menjaga pesakit kronik
Keluarga dengan keperluan penjagaan perubatan serius
benefitSummaryBm: BPT membantu meringankan beban penjagaan keluarga, penjaga, atau pesakit yang layak.
eligibilitySummaryBm: Syarat penjagaan atau keadaan pesakit terpakai
Pendapatan bulanan isi rumah tidak melebihi RM5,000
applicationMethodBm: Mohon melalui JKM dan sediakan bukti perubatan atau berkaitan OKU.
importantNotesBm: Borang awam tidak mengumpul diagnosis perubatan terperinci atau pengesahan penjagaan.
Penilaian rasmi JKM diperlukan.
nextStepsBm: Sahkan kriteria perubatan/penjagaan dengan JKM
Sediakan dokumen perubatan, identiti, pendapatan, dan alamat
Mohon melalui JKM atau eBantuan JKM

title: PERKESO Employment Insurance System (SIP) Benefits
shortDescription: PERKESO employment insurance benefits for insured persons who lost employment, apply within 60 days, meet contribution qualifying conditions, and register with MYFutureJobs.
benefitSummary: SIP provides employment insurance benefits and re-employment support for eligible insured persons.
eligibilitySummary: Application within 60 days from loss of employment
Loss of employment fits Act 800 definitions
applicationMethod: Apply through the official PERKESO EIS portal and register with MYFutureJobs.
importantNotes: Voluntary resignation, misconduct dismissal, retirement, and some contract endings are not covered loss-of-employment cases.
KelayakanKu relies on selected job-loss and contribution answers only.

supportNeeds: Not sure — show me suitable support options

requiredDocuments: Six months salary statements before loss of employment
nextSteps: Apply within 60 days of loss of employment
Check contribution qualifying conditions with PERKESO
Register with MYFutureJobs
Prepare original documents for PERKESO verification
evidenceNotes: PERKESO EIS portal states applications must be within 60 days, require contribution qualifying conditions, defined loss of employment, documents, and MYFutureJobs registration.
shortDescriptionBm: Faedah insurans pekerjaan PERKESO untuk orang berinsurans yang kehilangan pekerjaan, memohon dalam tempoh 60 hari, memenuhi syarat kelayakan caruman, dan berdaftar dengan MYFutureJobs.
benefitSummaryBm: SIP menyediakan faedah insurans pekerjaan dan sokongan penempatan semula pekerjaan untuk orang berinsurans yang layak.
eligibilitySummaryBm: Permohonan dalam tempoh 60 hari dari tarikh kehilangan pekerjaan
applicationMethodBm: Mohon melalui portal rasmi EIS PERKESO dan daftar dengan MYFutureJobs.
importantNotesBm: Peletakan jawatan sukarela, salah laku, persaraan, dan sesetengah tamat kontrak tidak termasuk kes kehilangan pekerjaan yang dilindungi.
KelayakanKu bergantung pada jawapan kehilangan kerja dan caruman yang dipilih sahaja.
requiredDocumentsBm: Penyata gaji enam bulan sebelum kehilangan pekerjaan
nextStepsBm: Mohon dalam tempoh 60 hari dari kehilangan pekerjaan
Semak syarat kelayakan caruman dengan PERKESO
Daftar dengan MYFutureJobs
Sediakan dokumen asal untuk pengesahan PERKESO
